untranslatable_reason: Cup-with-Handle pattern requires multi-week morphological analysis (65-week cup formation, handle formation in upper half, cup lip levelness comparison). These geometric/structural requirements cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicators. The conversion above captures the breakout confirmation and price positioning, but lacks mechanisms to detect: (1) the rounded cup shape over 65 weeks, (2) handle drift constraints (no lower than 50% down cup), (3) lip evenness comparison (excluding scallops), and (4) the pause-before-breakout behavior. A proper implementation would require custom structural pattern recognition or multi-timeframe analysis.
